.gitignore.general_idea: Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration directory to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific files from being tracked.

README.md.human_impl: Replace `@Rule` and `RestServiceRule` examples with `@ExtendWith(MockitoSpringEndpointExtension.class)` and `@MockEndpoint` annotations.
